title: RentGoose — Rent Collection & Landlord Accounting Overview

content.intro: RentGoose is PropertyGoose's integrated rent collection and landlord accounting module. It tracks rent schedules, arrears, client account entries, and produces landlord statements.

sections.title: Key Features
sections.content: RentGoose provides a comprehensive suite of financial tracking tools for letting agents. Key features include: a rent schedule per tenancy showing all due and received payments, an arrears tracking and chase queue to manage overdue rent, landlord payout records to track disbursements, a client account ledger for reconciliation, and monthly and annual landlord statements exportable as CSV.

sections.title: Getting Started with RentGoose
sections.content: RentGoose activates automatically when a tenancy is created in PropertyGoose. There is no separate setup required. Rent due dates are set during tenancy setup and generate monthly payment schedule entries automatically. As rent payments are recorded, the schedule updates to show paid and outstanding balances. Arrears are flagged automatically when rent becomes overdue.

sections.title: RentGoose is in Beta
sections.content: RentGoose is currently in Beta. Access it via the RentGoose option in the sidebar beta section. As a Beta product, features are being actively refined — use the bug report button within the app to flag any issues you encounter.
